name: blood-pressure-input
title: Blood Pressure Input
description: Paired systolic/diastolic entry with a live AHA-category badge from one source of truth.

props.name: value
props.type: { systolic: number | null; diastolic: number | null }

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Fires on every edit with the current reading.

clinicalNotes: The live AHA category is informational only — it must never block saving an implausible-but-real reading, because hypertensive crises exist. Out-of-bounds values and an inverted systolic/diastolic are flagged, not gated. Unit is fixed to mmHg. The badge and the inputs read from one value, so the preview can never disagree with what was entered.
notes: Round-2 form component; composes blood-pressure-badge + field + input.
